contentdetails.title: Power Content Details
contentdetails.description: Detailed information about the selected content item - properties, references, versions.

activeeditors.title: Active Editors
activeeditors.description: See who else is editing this content and collaborate with your team.

contenttypeaudit.title: Content Type Audit
contenttypeaudit.description: Overview of all content types, their usage, properties, and inheritance.

personalizationaudit.title: Personalization Audit
personalizationaudit.description: Find and audit visitor group usage across content, access rights, and properties.

audiencemanager.title: Audience Manager
audiencemanager.description: Manage and review visitor groups and audience segments.

contenttyperecommendations.title: Content Type Recommendations
contenttyperecommendations.description: Get recommendations for content type improvements and consolidation.

bulkpropertyeditor.title: Bulk Property Editor
bulkpropertyeditor.description: Edit properties across multiple content items at once.

scheduledjobsgantt.title: Scheduled Jobs Gantt
scheduledjobsgantt.description: Visualize scheduled job execution as a Gantt chart.

activitytimeline.title: Activity Timeline
activitytimeline.description: View a timeline of content changes and editorial activity.

contentimporter.title: Content Importer
contentimporter.description: Import content from CSV, JSON, or Excel files.

cmsdoctor.title: CMS Doctor
cmsdoctor.description: Health checks and diagnostics for your CMS installation.

contentaudit.title: Content Audit
contentaudit.description: Audit content for quality, completeness, and best practices.

linkchecker.title: Link Checker
linkchecker.description: Find and report broken links across your site.

activeeditors.title: Active Editors
activeeditors.description: See who is currently editing content and collaborate in real time.

managechildren.title: Manage Children
managechildren.description: Bulk manage child pages: sort, publish, unpublish, move, and delete.

overview.title: Overview
overview.description: Dashboard overview of all Editor Powertools features.

visitorgrouptester.title: Visitor Group Tester
visitorgrouptester.description: Floating toolbar to simulate visitor group membership and inspect editable content elements.

contentstatistics.title: Content Statistics
contentstatistics.description: Visual dashboard with charts showing content distribution, creation trends, staleness, and editor activity.

contentanalysis.description: Unified job that traverses all content once and runs all registered analyzers (content type stats, personalization, link checking, etc.).
contentanalysis.completed: Completed. Analyzed {0} content items with {1} analyzers ({2}).

cmsdoctor.runjobfirst: Run the '[EditorPowertools] Content Analysis' scheduled job first.

memorycheck.name: Memory Usage
memorycheck.description: Reports current memory usage of the application.
memorycheck.biton64: Running as 32-bit on 64-bit OS. Memory: {0} MB.
memorycheck.details: Working set: {0} MB, GC heap: {1} MB, 64-bit process: {2}, 64-bit OS: {3}

versioninfocheck.name: CMS Version
versioninfocheck.description: Reports the current Optimizely CMS version.

contenttypecheck.name: Content Type Count
contenttypecheck.description: Checks if the number of content types is within reasonable limits.
contenttypecheck.toomanypagetypes: Too many page types ({0}). Editors may struggle to find the right one.
contenttypecheck.toomanyblocktypes: Too many block types ({0}). Consider consolidating.
contenttypecheck.toofewpagetypes: Only {0} page type(s). Content may lack structure.
contenttypecheck.details: Page types: {0}, Block types: {1}, Media types: {2}, Total: {3}

orphanedpropertycheck.name: Orphaned Properties
orphanedpropertycheck.description: Finds properties defined in the database but not in code.
orphanedpropertycheck.found: {0} orphaned properties found in the database that are not defined in code.

scheduledjobscheck.name: Scheduled Jobs Health
scheduledjobscheck.description: Checks for failed or long-running scheduled jobs.

draftcontentcheck.name: Stale Drafts
draftcontentcheck.description: Checks for draft content that has never been published or has old unpublished changes.
draftcontentcheck.warning: {0} stale content items found. Consider reviewing and cleaning up.

brokenlinkscheck.name: Broken Links
brokenlinkscheck.description: Reports broken links found by the Link Checker tool.
brokenlinkscheck.nodata: No link data available. Run the Content Analysis scheduled job first.
brokenlinkscheck.nodatadetails: The Link Checker analyzer populates this data during the scheduled job.
brokenlinkscheck.fault: {0} broken links found across {1} total links.
brokenlinkscheck.notavailable: Link checker data not available yet.

missingalttextcheck.name: Missing Alt Text
missingalttextcheck.description: Checks for images missing alt text (accessibility and SEO issue).
missingalttextcheck.details: {0} of {1} images ({2}%) have no alt text. Last analyzed: {3}

unusedcontentcheck.name: Unused Content
unusedcontentcheck.description: Checks for blocks and media not referenced by anything (potential orphans).
unusedcontentcheck.ok: All blocks and media are referenced.
unusedcontentcheck.details: {0} of {1} blocks/media ({2}%) are unreferenced. Last analyzed: {3}

everyonepublishrightscheck.name: Everyone Publish Rights
everyonepublishrightscheck.description: Reports content where the "Everyone" role has Publish or higher access.
everyonepublishrightscheck.nodata: No security audit data available. Run the Content Analysis scheduled job first.
everyonepublishrightscheck.nodatadetails: The Security Audit analyzer populates this data during the scheduled job.
everyonepublishrightscheck.ok: No content grants Publish to the "Everyone" role.
everyonepublishrightscheck.warning: {0} content item(s) grant Publish or higher to the "Everyone" role.
everyonepublishrightscheck.notavailable: Security audit data not available yet.

unrestrictedcontentcheck.name: Unrestricted Content
unrestrictedcontentcheck.description: Reports pages with no access restrictions set.
unrestrictedcontentcheck.nodata: No security audit data available. Run the Content Analysis scheduled job first.
unrestrictedcontentcheck.nodatadetails: The Security Audit analyzer populates this data during the scheduled job.
unrestrictedcontentcheck.badpractice: {0} page(s) have no access restrictions (wide open).
unrestrictedcontentcheck.notavailable: Security audit data not available yet.

inconsistentinheritancecheck.name: Inconsistent Permission Inheritance
inconsistentinheritancecheck.description: Reports content that is more permissive than its parent, which may indicate accidental ACL changes.
inconsistentinheritancecheck.nodata: No security audit data available. Run the Content Analysis scheduled job first.
inconsistentinheritancecheck.nodatadetails: The Security Audit analyzer populates this data during the scheduled job.
inconsistentinheritancecheck.warning: {0} content item(s) are more permissive than their parent.
inconsistentinheritancecheck.notavailable: Security audit data not available yet.

errors.nomapping: No mapping configured. Run dry-run first.
errors.processingerror: An error occurred while processing the request.
